{{CargoOrgan
|name=Liar's Tougue
|type=Common
|rank=orange
|id=10949
|idx=143
|description=This cursed tongue once belonged to a liar. It grew longer with every lie—until he met his destined one, and finally found a better use for it.
|skill=
|hp=2718
|def=227
|atk=138
|rush=208
|gene1=Water DMG +90
|gene2=Each round, {race} ATK +60
|gene3=Each round, {race} RUSH +60
|gene4=Water RES +90
|gene5=Water DMG +1.5%
|gene7=Water DMG +4.5% (Awakened)
|}}
